task_completion.description: Verify the agent created and joined the correct Jitsi meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/FitCoach-LiveSession' or the Jitsi interface displays the room name 'FitCoach-LiveSession'.

task_completion.description: Verify the display name is set to 'Coach Rivera'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The participant thumbnail, the bottom toolbar, or the Settings -> Profile menu shows the name 'Coach Rivera'.

task_completion.description: Verify a virtual background (blur or image) is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Virtual Background' settings panel is open with 'Blur' or an image selected, or the user's video feed clearly shows a blurred or replaced background.

task_completion.description: Verify the video quality is set to the highest available setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Performance settings' or 'Video quality' dialog is visible with the slider or option set to the maximum/highest level (e.g., High Definition).

task_completion.description: Verify the policy requiring all participants to start muted is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Settings menu (typically under the 'More' tab) shows the 'Everyone starts muted' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the session configuration guide was written to the correct path with the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file '/home/ga/Desktop/coaching_session_config.txt' containing the meeting URL, the configured settings (background, quality, mute policy), and replication guidelines.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser open to the Jitsi interface with menus or settings panels being actively clicked or modified, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually applied the settings in Jitsi, rather than only writing about them in the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be visual evidence of the Jitsi settings menus (background, quality, mute policy, profile) being accessed and changed in the browser.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration guide is genuinely written and not a direct copy-paste of the task prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file content should be structured as a guide (with URL, settings list, and guidelines) rather than just pasting the raw instructions provided to the agent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet instance is hosted at http://localhost:8080. The required room name is 'FitCoach-LiveSession'. The required display name is 'Coach Rivera'. The configuration guide must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/coaching_session_config.txt'.
